title: Página Overview: Dashboard Resumido + Tabela de Stats Compacta
plan: Add Chart.js CDN to base.html template head
Extend data.py to aggregate stats by month and by week (grouping daily_reports), compute bb/100 and ROI, and return redline/blueline chart data
Update cash routes to accept period filter query params and pass filtered/aggregated data to template
Update tournament routes similarly for tournament-specific metrics (ROI instead of bb/100)

Rewrite cash/overview.html with: summary cards row (total hands, net profit, bb/100, days played), compact tracker-style stats table with Overall row + monthly/weekly rows with health badges, profit-over-time Chart.js line chart, red/blue line Chart.js chart, period filter controls, 'Ver detalhes' links per row
Create tournament/overview.html with tournament-specific variant (ROI card, tournament stats)
Add CSS styles for dashboard layout: filter bar, compact stats table, health badge colors, chart containers, responsive grid
Add JavaScript for: Chart.js profit chart rendering, red/blue line chart rendering, period filter logic (last month/3 months/year/custom), month/week toggle switching, linking 'Ver detalhes' rows
